_doc: Whalabroad tunables. Board scales with player count via ringScale; harborRepairRadius is the manhattan distance from any harbor cell where a ship can Repair.
_whaleStartingHPNote: default = N ships + 1 (computed at startGame). Host can override via preset.
_movementNote: Ship FullSail = 3 tiles + no fire. SlowCrawl = 1 tile + can fire. Towing forces SlowCrawl. Recoil after firing limits next turn to 1 tile.
_whaleMoveNote: DeepDive 4 hidden tiles. Bubble 3 hidden tiles BUT broadcasts a hint zone. Breach 2 surface tiles. SurpriseBreach 0 move (rises + attacks).
_damageNote: Whale Ram (surface) = 2. Surprise Breach = 1. Cannon = 1. Kraken = 1.
_rangeNote: Cannon perpendicular to ship facing, 3 tiles either side. Harpoon adjacent to corpse only.
_rollingRuleNote: In any 5-turn rolling window: max 3 submerged turns + min 2 surface turns. Of those 3 submerged, exactly 1 can be the Bubble move. Server enforces.
_stormNote: At stormStartTurn the outermost ring (north/east/west, NOT south so harbor stays accessible) becomes impassable. One-time event.
_harborNote: harborCells defined per ringScale; computed dynamically at startGame.
_krakenNote: Each dead ship gets ONE Kraken summon. Tap a tile (hidden from living). Next turn: 1 dmg + 1-tile outward push to anything in 3x3 around target.
_ghostNote: Dead ships get full god view (whale exact position even when submerged) + 1 whisper per turn to one chosen living ally.
whaleTaunts: From hell's heart I stab at thee.
Towards thee I roll, thou all-destroying but unconquering whale.
I'll chase him round Good Hope, and round the Horn.
The deep has a long memory.
Your harpoons sing to me. Sing on.
Salt and silence. That is all you'll find.
I am the abyss made flesh.
Your captain warned you. He should have listened to himself.
I have outlasted three captains. You will not be the fourth.
Hear that, in the dark? That is your name being forgotten.
